tasks.title: Initialize Next.js Project with TypeScript and Tailwind
tasks.description: Set up the foundational project structure using Next.js App Router, TypeScript for type safety, and Tailwind CSS for styling.
tasks.details: Run 'npx create-next-app@latest portfolio --typescript --tailwind --eslint'. Configure 'next.config.js' for static export if needed. Ensure 'tsconfig.json' is set up correctly. Initialize git repository.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify project builds successfully with 'npm run build'. Check that TypeScript compiles without errors and Tailwind classes are applied in the default page.

tasks.title: Configure GitHub Pages Deployment
tasks.description: Set up the deployment pipeline to host the site at [<myusername>.github.io].
tasks.details: Update 'next.config.js' to output static files ('output: export'). Add a GitHub Actions workflow or configure build settings in repository settings for Pages. Ensure base URL is set correctly.
tasks.testStrategy: Deploy a test branch and verify the site is accessible at the specified GitHub Pages URL.

tasks.title: Implement Design System and Dark Mode
tasks.description: Integrate shadcn/ui components and configure Tailwind for a modern dark mode aesthetic.
tasks.details: Install 'shadcn-ui' CLI. Configure 'tailwind.config.js' with dark mode strategy ('class'). Define global CSS variables for dark theme colors in 'globals.css'. Ensure components support dark mode toggling.
tasks.testStrategy: Render a test page with shadcn components (Button, Card). Verify dark mode classes apply correctly and contrast ratios meet accessibility standards.

tasks.title: Create Data Dictionary Structure for Dynamic Content
tasks.description: Define TypeScript interfaces and data objects for Projects, Experience, Education, and Tech Stack to enable easy future updates.
tasks.details: Create a 'data' directory with separate files (e.g., 'projects.ts', 'experience.ts'). Define interfaces for each section (title, description, date, link). Export these as constants to be imported by components.
tasks.testStrategy: Import data objects into a dummy component and verify TypeScript types match the expected structure. Ensure no runtime errors occur when rendering data.

tasks.title: Build Main Layout and Navigation
tasks.description: Construct the responsive layout shell including header navigation and footer.
tasks.details: Create 'app/layout.tsx' with a sticky navbar using shadcn's NavigationMenu. Implement smooth scrolling anchor links for sections (Hero, About, Projects). Ensure mobile menu works via responsive breakpoints.
tasks.testStrategy: Navigate between sections using the menu. Verify navigation bar remains accessible on mobile and desktop. Check that scroll behavior is smooth.

tasks.title: Implement Hero Section
tasks.description: Develop the top section with summary statement and 'View my Work' CTA button.
tasks.details: Create 'Hero.tsx' component. Use Tailwind for centering content. Implement the 'View my Work' button linking to the Projects section ID. Ensure text is responsive and legible on mobile.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify Hero section renders correctly on mobile (stacked) and desktop (centered). Click CTA button and confirm navigation to Projects section.

tasks.title: Develop About Me and Tech Stack Sections
tasks.description: Build the 'About Me' and 'Tech Stack' sections using the data dictionary.
tasks.details: Create 'AboutMe.tsx' and 'TechStack.tsx'. Map over the data dictionaries to render lists of skills or bio text. Use shadcn Cards for tech stack items.
tasks.testStrategy: Check that all defined skills appear in Tech Stack. Verify About Me text matches the data dictionary content.

tasks.title: Develop Professional Experience and Education Sections
tasks.description: Build sections for work history and academic background using dynamic data.
tasks.details: Create 'Experience.tsx' and 'Education.tsx'. Use a timeline or card layout to display roles/degrees. Ensure dates and company names are pulled from the data dictionary.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all entries in the experience/education dictionaries render correctly. Check date formatting consistency.

tasks.title: Implement Projects Section
tasks.description: Build the main portfolio showcase section with project cards and links.
tasks.details: Create 'Projects.tsx'. Render project cards using shadcn Card components. Include images (placeholders if needed), titles, descriptions, and links to live demos/repos. Ensure grid layout is responsive.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all projects from the dictionary render. Check that external links open in new tabs. Test image loading states.

tasks.title: Optimize SEO and Performance
tasks.description: Ensure mobile-first design, fast loading times, and SEO friendliness.
tasks.details: Add metadata to 'layout.tsx' (title, description). Implement lazy loading for images. Minimize CSS bundle size. Run Lighthouse audit and fix accessibility issues.
tasks.testStrategy: Run 'npm run build' and check bundle size. Use Lighthouse to verify performance score >90 and SEO score 100. Test mobile responsiveness on various devices.
